brand.name: ZebraLab (by BoaIdeia)
brand.description: Visual drag-and-drop label designer for Zebra ZD220 printers. Minimalist, professional SaaS UI.

headings.usage: Headers, panel titles, modal titles. Keeps it modern but geometric.

body.usage: Tooltips, properties, labels, buttons. Highly legible for technical tools.

mono.usage: ZPL preview, variable tags like {price}, dimensions (e.g. 50x30mm).

structure.topbar: h-14 border-b border-brand-200 bg-white flex items-center px-4 justify-between
structure.left_sidebar: w-64 border-r border-brand-200 bg-white flex flex-col h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]
structure.center_workspace: flex-1 bg-[#e8dfce] shadow-inner relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center p-8
structure.right_sidebar: w-80 border-l border-brand-200 bg-white flex flex-col h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)]

layout.canvas_area: bg-white shadow-md border border-brand-200/50 transition-all duration-200 (Represents the physical label)
layout.spacing: Tight padding (p-3 to p-4) in sidebars to maximize vertical space. Use standard Tailwind utilities.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-900 text-white hover:bg-brand-800 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-body font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-brand-500 focus:ring-offset-1
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-brand-300 text-brand-900 hover:bg-brand-50 rounded-none px-4 py-2 font-body font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-brand-800 hover:bg-brand-100 hover:text-brand-900 rounded-none px-3 py-1.5 transition-colors

inputs.text: bg-white border border-brand-300 text-brand-900 text-sm rounded-none px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-brand-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-brand-900 w-full placeholder:text-brand-800/50
inputs.select: bg-white border border-brand-300 text-brand-900 text-sm rounded-none px-3 py-2 w-full appearance-none focus:border-brand-900
inputs.labels: text-xs font-semibold text-brand-800 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5 block

panels.section_header: px-4 py-3 border-b border-brand-200 bg-brand-50/50 flex items-center justify-between
panels.section_title: text-sm font-headings font-semibold text-brand-900 uppercase tracking-wide

tools.tool_button: w-full flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 text-sm text-brand-800 hover:bg-brand-100 border border-transparent hover:border-brand-200 transition-all text-left

motion_and_interactions.hover: Crisp, fast transitions. duration-150. Buttons and tools highlight in brand-100.
motion_and_interactions.active: Active items in sidebars get a distinct left-border (e.g. border-l-4 border-brand-900) or bold text.
motion_and_interactions.focus: Standard accessible focus rings using focus:ring-brand-500

specific_views.canvas_editor: The label should appear as a white rectangle in the center of the tan workspace workspace. Zoom controls at the bottom right. Rulers (optional) on top/left.
specific_views.properties_panel: When a text/barcode element is selected, the right panel shows X/Y coordinates, Font family, Size, Bold/Italic, Rotation (0/90/180/270), and Data Source (Static vs Variable).
specific_views.batch_print_modal: A clean modal overlay with a file dropzone for CSV/Excel, and a table mapping CSV columns to canvas variables {variable_name}.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup standard React app with Tailwind CSS.
2. Install @phosphor-icons/react for all icons (e.g., TextT, Barcode, Image, Square, LineSegment).
3. Use generic HTML/JS for drag-and-drop canvas logic, or react-rnd / standard mouse events. Keep it simple and performant.
4. Layout must strictly follow the 3-panel Technical Grid Borders layout described above. No floating glassmorphism panels.
5. Use JetBrains Mono for the ZPL Preview output window.
6. Ensure all inputs and buttons follow the strict sharp/rounded-none aesthetic with the BoaIdeia brown palette.
7. Include `data-testid` on all buttons, canvas elements, and inputs.
